blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 30 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,850 ft. Looking ahead, 64 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow. Models disagree — check back.
Friday: 21" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
